channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: One Problem for the SpaceX IPO
item.description: Trillion dollar companies are typically profitable. SpaceX lost about $5 billion in 2025, according to its IPO registration statement.

item.title: Lucid’s more affordable Cosmos midsize SUV spotted testing next to Tesla Model Y
item.description: A camouflaged Lucid Cosmos prototype has been spotted testing on public roads near the Lucid factory in Casa Grande, Arizona. The photo shows the midsize SUV right next to a Tesla Model Y, giving us our best real-world size comparison yet. The sighting comes as Lucid prepares for the Cosmos’s ful...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Up 11.8% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

item.title: Tesla Cybercab: hate it or love it, it is the most efficient EV ever
item.description: Tesla’s Cybercab has been certified at 165 Wh/mi, making it the most efficient electric vehicle ever produced — by a wide margin. The next most efficient EV on the market, the Lucid Air Pure, consumes 28% more energy per mile. Tesla VP of Vehicle Engineering Lars Moravy confirmed the figure, whic...

item.title: SpaceX Targets $75 Billion IPO at Up to $2 Trillion Valuation
item.description: Filing shows Musk retaining control as SpaceX expands deeper into AI, Starlink and space infrastructure ambitions.

item.title: 12 Zeros and 1 Musk: The Trillionaire Era Officially Begins.
item.description: Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk, already the world’s richest person, is now the world’s first trillionaire. On Wednesday, his rocket company, SpaceX, released its initial public offering registration statement to the public. Musk’s Tesla stock, including his 2018 vested stock options, is currentl...

item.title: Why the SpaceX Hype Isn’t Boosting Tesla Stock
item.description: Shares have been listless lately as investors have given SpaceX more of their attention. Investors have also turned their attention to SpaceX, which made its IPO registration public on Wednesday. Tesla CEO Elon Musk, of course, runs both companies, and Tesla was mentioned in the filing almost 90 ...

item.title: NIO Drops 6% on First-Ever Profit, Tesla Moves Up 2%: The Two-Speed EV Trade in Action
item.description: Shares of Nio (NYSE:NIO) are down 7% on Friday morning, an unusual reaction to a quarter that, on paper, marked a genuine turning point for the Chinese EV maker. Nio’s revenue jumped 112% year over year, deliveries nearly doubled, and the company posted its first-ever quarterly adjusted operating...

item.title: Tesla Recalls Model Y SUVs Over Missing Weight Labels
item.description: Tesla is recalling 14,575 Model Y SUVs in the U.S.

item.title: Should You Wait to Buy Tesla Stock After June 12?
item.description: The upcoming SpaceX IPO may be bad news for Tesla's stock.

item.title: Musk Targets Friday for Delayed Starship Launch and What It Means for the IPO
item.description: The Starship test flight comes as investors gear up for SpaceX’s initial public offering, which could value the company at $2 trillion or more.

item.title: Musk’s Latest Venture Gives Space Stocks Their Own Tesla Surge
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- With the highly-anticipated debut of SpaceX on the US stock market around the corner, euphoria for Elon Musk’s rocket venture is drawing comparisons to Tesla Inc.’s effect on electric-vehicle stocks. Most Read from BloombergBungie Plans Layoffs After Ending ‘Destiny 2’ DevelopmentS...

item.title: $890 Million: Inside The Curious Relationship Between Tesla And Space X
item.description: Tesla Inc. has sold roughly $890 million in vehicles and batteries to other companies in Elon Musk’s orbit since 2023, and a Wednesday filing showed the buyers paid full price. The SpaceX prospectus disclosed about $131 million in Cybertruck purchases...

item.title: SpaceX Just Told the SEC What Could Crash Its Stock Overnight, and It Has Nothing to Do With Rockets
item.description: Skim the headlines and you might assume the biggest risk to SpaceX shareholders is a Starship blowing up on the pad, or a Falcon 9 losing a payload. After reading the company’s pre-IPO disclosures this week, I’m convinced the biggest threat to shareholders is Elon Musk himself. SpaceX signed its ...

item.title: SpaceX Will Try Another Starship Launch Today Ahead of IPO
item.description: The Starship test flight comes as investors gear up for SpaceX’s initial public offering, which could value the company at $2 trillion or more.

item.title: Elon Musk Mega-Merger? Dan Ives Puts SpaceX Tesla Tie-Up Odds At 80%
item.description: Elon Musk's corporate universe could be headed for its biggest combination yet, according to Wedbush analyst Dan Ives, who is now putting an 80% probability on a Tesla Inc. and SpaceX merger. Ives made the call in a Wednesday note...

item.title: Prediction: 1 Stock That Will Be Worth More Than Tesla and SpaceX Combined by Next Year
item.description: This technology stock should have significantly more earnings power than the two Elon Musk-led businesses.

item.title: How 1 Top Global EV Maker Adjusted to the Iran Conflict and Is Thriving
item.description: BYD overtook Tesla in global EV sales last year. It's doing another impressive thing amid the Iran conflict by raising export guidance.

item.title: Tesla is recalling 14,575 Model Ys because they may be missing a sticker
item.description: Tesla is recalling 14,575 Model Y vehicles, produced between November ’25 and April ’26, due to a possible missing certification label. more…

item.title: FSD subscription available in Denmark
item.description: Purchase options are gone for both FSD and EAP. submitted by /u/Talkar [link] [comments]

item.title: TSLA Stock Rises Premarket Despite Model Y Recalls — Retail Expects Musk To Reward Tesla Holders In 'Overpriced' IPO
item.description: Prediction market traders currently see the highest odds for a SpaceX debut valuation between $2 trillion and $2.5 trillion.

item.title: DXYZ, VCX Stocks Catch IPO Fever: Traders Chase SpaceX, OpenAI And Anthropic For Valuations Rivaling TSLA, META
item.description: SpaceX accounts for 16.2% of DXYZ’s portfolio, while VCX holds Anthropic at 20.7%, OpenAI at 9.9% and SpaceX at 5%.

item.title: Tesla Drops One-Time Purchase For Full Self-Driving In Europe
item.description: Just two European countries have approved the use of FSD (Supervised) so far. To use it, new buyers will have to pay a monthly fee.

item.title: Tesla FSD Expansion And Musk Ecosystem Ties Reshape Investor Questions
item.description: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) has launched its Full Self-Driving (FSD) software in China and nine additional markets after securing regulatory approval. The rollout marks a key expansion of Tesla's software offering into China, a highly competitive and closely watched electric vehicle and autonomous driv...

item.title: Tesla Draws Fresh SpaceX Merger Speculation After IPO Filing
item.description: Wedbush sees a potential deal, but prediction-market traders remain divided.

item.title: Parked glossy Cybercab with steering wheel
item.description: Spotted in Cupertino submitted by /u/Dry-Try8328 [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Investors Beware? SpaceX IPO Could Pull Cash, Attention And Musk Away From EV Giant
item.description: Elon Musk-led commercial spaceflight giant SpaceX‘s IPO could become a problem for Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) investors and shareholders as the market readies itself for the June IPO date. Muskonomy The upcoming IPO could take investors’ appetite away from Tesla and onto SpaceX, while also shifting...

item.title: No, Tesla Doesn't Need E.U. Approval to Sell Full Self-Driving (Supervised) in Europe
item.description: It can go country by country.

item.title: Ross Gerber Invokes Netflix, Says Mercedes Made A 'Blockbuster' Error By Letting 10% Tesla Stake Slip Away
item.description: Ross Gerber, co-founder of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth & Investment Management, agreed Tuesday with a social media post arguing that Mercedes-Benz Group AG’s $50 million investment for nearly 10% of Tesla Inc. in 2009 would be worth about $130 billion today...

item.title: SpaceX reveals reason for Starship v3 stand down, announces next launch date
item.description: SpaceX has decided to stand down from what was supposed to be the first test launch of Starship’s v3 rocket tonight after a minor issue with a hydraulic pin delayed the flight once more. The company scrubbed its first test flight of the upgraded Starship v3 on May 21 in the final minutes of the c...

item.title: Tesla Model S signature Edition First Look
item.description: Tesla Model S signature Edition First Look submitted by /u/MikeILL [link] [comments]

item.title: Review & Preview: Oily Roller Coaster
item.description: The Dow clinched another record close today. Plus, the SpaceX IPO filing tells us a lot about Elon Musk’s wealth.

item.title: Waymo suspends freeway rides, pauses Atlanta operations amid safety fixes
item.description: Alphabet's Waymo said on Thursday it has suspended its robotaxi service on freeways ‌in the United States and paused its operations ‌in Atlanta, Georgia as it updates software to improve performance around ​construction zones and flooded roadways. The suspension comes as Waymo, which has been gro...

item.title: Main Street can now bet on OpenAl, SpaceX through Polymarket
item.description: The biggest financial story of the last decade is not what is happening on Wall Street. It is what is happening just outside of it. The most valuable companies of this generation, the ones running cloud infrastructure, satellite internet, rocket launches and a sizable chunk of artificial ...

item.title: ‘SpaceX is his new baby at the expense of Tesla’: Elon Musk’s IPO could be bad news for his EV maker, investors warns
item.description: SpaceX will reportedly allocate 30% of shares to retail investors, betting on the CEO’s loyal base of investors—and putting Tesla under more scrutiny.

item.title: Why SpaceX's IPO could be the biggest market opportunity in history
item.description: Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian breaks down SpaceX's (SPAX.PVT) finances ahead of its upcoming initial public offering (IPO).

item.title: Forget ‘TechnoKing’: Elon Musk will really be king at SpaceX
item.description: Musk, who will have more than 50% of the voting power, will have a monarchical grip over the publicly-traded version of SpaceX — control that goes far beyond what other tech founders enjoy.

item.title: Solid-state EV batteries hit another major milestone in China
item.description: Chinese lithium metal giant Ganfeng Lithium has begun producing what it calls the world’s first 10 Ah solid-state batteries with an energy density of 500 Wh/kg. The lithium giant has supply deals with Tesla, Volkswagen, Hyundai, and several other major OEMs for key EV battery materials. more…

item.title: Model S & X Signature delivery event (event starts 1:08:20)
item.description: submitted by /u/twinbee [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises as China Finally Gets Musk's Self-Driving Push
item.description: Tesla Stock Gains After China Opens Door to Self-Driving Software

item.title: Tesla Stock Continues to Be Dramatically Overvalued Amid Company Struggles
item.description: A new fee on EVs is being considered by the U.S. House of Representatives, which could add slightly to the firm's woes.

item.title: SpaceX Has Huge Solar Ambitions. The Challenges Are Vast.
item.description: SpaceX’s idea is to use solar panel arrays to power floating data centers it calls AI compute satellites.

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Files for What Could be Largest IPO in History
item.description: Space Exploration Technologies, widely known as SpaceX, has filed for an initial public offering in

item.title: Tesla Model Y becomes first-ever car to reach legendary milestone
item.description: The Tesla Model Y became the first-ever car to reach a legendary Norwegian milestone, surpassing 100,000 new registrations after gaining a reputation as one of the most popular vehicles in the country and the world. As of May 20, Norwegian authorities have registered 100,224 units of the electric...

item.title: SpaceX Finally Filed and the S-1? Well, She’s a Lot
item.description: 308 pages of rockets, brain chips, $60 billion in liabilities, and a CEO who the company admits doesn't actually work there full time. Welcome to the most Elon IPO ever.

item.title: Forget Tesla for Retirees: Here Are 3 Value-Driven Automotive Stalwarts to Buy Right Now
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) is once again sucking up financial oxygen, with Reddit’s wallstreetbets crowd posting sentiment scores as high as 88 (Very Bullish) on robotaxi, Optimus, and China-deal chatter. Tesla closed at $404.11 on May 19, 2026, against a trailing P/E of 373 and a forward P/E of 208, w...

item.title: SpaceX's Historic IPO: 5 Things You Need to Know
item.description: SpaceX will be the largest IPO in history. Stock Strategist Andrew Rocco explains what you need to know.

item.title: Genesis AI Expands Executive Team Across Legal and Operations with Former X and Tesla Leaders
item.description: Genesis AI, a global full-stack robotics company, today announced the appointments of two senior leaders as the company rapidly expands its talent pool and accelerates toward the introduction of its first general-purpose robot. Damien Kieran, who was formerly Chief Legal and Privacy Officer at Sa...

item.title: Inside SpaceX’s IPO Filing: Musk’s Control, xAI Losses, and Anthropic’s Massive AI Deal
item.description: SpaceX long-awaited IPO filing arrived Wednesday afternoon, offering investors their first detailed look at Elon Musk’s rocket and AI empire. SpaceX is going after what it describes as a $28.5 trillion addressable market “to build the systems and technologies necessary to make life multiplanetar...

item.title: SpaceX Is Quietly Trading at a Price That Would Make It 23x Bigger Than Facebook’s IPO
item.description: Somewhere between a thought experiment and a margin call, SpaceX has a price. On Hyperliquid, a decentralized derivatives venue, a synthetic contract called SPCX-USD recently changed hands around $203. Plug that price into the company’s share count and the implied valuation lands at roughly $2.4 ...
